data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified: (1) grid layout from 3b4ca4f1 reverted — pool row uses flex with w-[140px]/sm:w-[220px] fixed widths. (2) Pills stack beneath agent name via layout="stacked" prop on AgentDisplayLabel in pool row only. (3) Default inline layout preserved — 5 other consumers unaffected, zero diff on their files. (4) Tests validate flex layout, fixed widths, no grid classes, and stacked prop usage. All quality gates pass: lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2349 tests passed, build OK.
